title: Kanmani Anbodu Kadhalan Song Lyrics in Tamil
stanzas:
kanmani anbodu kadhalan
naan ezhuthum kadithame
ponmani un veettil soukyama
naan ingu soukyame

unnai enni parkkaiyil
kavithai sottuthu
athai ezhutha ninaikkaiyil
varthai muttuthu

undaana kaayam ingu
thannaale aari pogum
maayam enna
ponmaane ponmaane

enna kaayam aana pothum
en meni thangi kollum
undhan meni thangathu
senthene

endhan kadhal yenna vendru
sollaamal yenga yenga
azhugai vanthathu

endhan sogam unnai thakkum
enrennum bothu
vantha azhugai ninrathu

manidhar unarnthu kolla
ithu manidha kadhal alla
athaiyum thaandi
punithamanathu

suba laali laali laali laali
abiraami laali laali laali
tamilStanzas:
கண்மணி
அன்போடு காதலன்
நான் எழுதும் கடிதமே
பொன்மணி
உன் வீட்டில் சௌக்கியமா
நான் இங்கு சௌக்யமே

உண்டான காயம் இங்கு
தன்னாலே ஆறி போன
மாயம் என்ன
பொன்மானே பொன்மானே

என்ன காயம் ஆன போதும்
என் மேனி தாங்கி கொள்ளும்
உந்தன் மேனி தாங்காது
செந்தேனே

எந்தன் காதல் என்னவென்று
சொல்லாமல் ஏங்க ஏங்க
அழுகை வந்தது
எந்தன் சோகம்
உன்னைத்தாக்கும்
என்றெண்ணும் பொது
வந்த அழுகை நின்றது

மனிதர் உணர்ந்துகொள்ள
இது மனித காதல் அல்ல
அதையும் தாண்டி
புனிதமானது.

சுப லாலி லாலி லாலி லாலி
அபிராமி லாலி லாலி லாலி

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kanmani Anbodu Kadhalan?

The song beautifully expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a lover writing to their beloved.

In which movie does this song appear?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Gunaa.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Ilaiyaraaja and S Janaki.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

The song was released in the year 1991.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Gunaa, Kanmani Anbodu Kadhalan is a poignant expression of love and yearning. The song is a letter from the protagonist to his beloved, filled with poetic imagery and heartfelt emotions. Ilaiyaraaja's composition, combined with the soulful voices of Ilaiyaraaja and S Janaki, creates a timeless melody that evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. The lyrics by Vaali add depth to the song, making it a cherished classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless romance of Kanmani Anbodu Kadhalan from the movie Gunaa. This enchanting duet by Ilaiyaraaja and S Janaki, with lyrics by Vaali, captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the soothing melodies crafted by Ilaiyaraaja that continue to resonate with audiences even today.
stanzaMeanings: Dear Kanmani, your lover is writing this letter. Is everything fine at your home? I am fine here.
When I think of you, poetry flows. But when I try to write it down, words fail me.
The wound I have will heal on its own, my dear golden one.
Even if I get hurt, my body can bear it, but your body cannot, my dear.
My love is crying without saying what it wants.
Whenever I think my sadness will affect you, my tears stop.
People may not understand this is not just human love; it is something purer.
Abiraami, the one who sings lullabies, do you know it's me?
Sivagaami, you are half of Shiva, do you understand that?
